message: TIFS-ready package needs an explicit owner/suspect/verifier threat model, attacker knowledge, access tiers, thresholds, and abstention policy.
Adaptive attack trace scores must be real scored outputs, not local diagnostic derivations.
Adaptive attack summary must report AUROC, TPR at 1 percent FPR, FPR0, and uncertainty.
Cross-base and cross-task matrix must include non-Qwen bases and non-math/code reasoning tasks.
Open-set package must report abstention, false attribution, coverage, and detection metrics.
Head-to-head baselines must use the same calibration protocol and report TPR at 1 percent FPR.
Main claims require at least five independent students per key cell with held-out FPR and uncertainty.
Review archive must include raw traces, adapters, scored matrices, logs, environment locks, and analysis code.
